query: SELECT e.id, e.actionId, e.colaboradorId, e.status, e.createdAt, SUBSTRING(e.descricao, 1, 100) AS descricao_resumo FROM evidences e WHERE e.status = 'aguardando_avaliacao' ORDER BY e.id DESC;
